data.name: Subtitle
data.value: Connect your training services and keep activities up to date.

data.name: NotConfigured
data.value: Strava is not configured for this PaceLetics installation yet.

data.name: ConnectDescription
data.value: Import your running activities into PaceLetics.

data.name: ImportExplanation
data.value: PaceLetics requests read access to your activities. Routes and GPS tracks are not stored.

data.name: DisconnectConfirm
data.value: Disconnect Strava and delete all imported Strava activities from PaceLetics?

data.name: DisconnectSuccess
data.value: Strava has been disconnected and its imported data deleted.

data.name: NoActivities
data.value: No running activities have been imported yet.

data.name: RateLimitError
data.value: Strava's request limit has been reached. Please try again later.

data.name: AuthorizationError
data.value: Strava authorization has expired. Please disconnect and reconnect.

data.name: CallbackConnected
data.value: Strava was connected and your running activities were synchronized.

data.name: CallbackSyncFailed
data.value: Strava was connected, but the first synchronization failed. You can retry it here.

data.name: CallbackDenied
data.value: Strava connection was cancelled. No data was imported.

data.name: CallbackScope
data.value: Activity access was not granted. PaceLetics cannot synchronize runs without that permission.

data.name: CallbackInvalidState
data.value: The Strava connection could not be verified. Please start it again.

data.name: CallbackError
data.value: Strava could not be connected. Please try again.

data.name: UserNotResolved
data.value: The signed-in user could not be identified.
